description: A color photograph of a woman with long dark wavy hair seated at a round wooden table in a wood-paneled office, leaning forward and signing a multi-page document with a blue pen. She wears a light beige sweater and a gold wristwatch. Behind her are a tall wooden door, a framed painting of a horse in a field, a wall-mounted keypad, and a small wooden side cabinet. The papers on the table carry small printed text that is not fully legible.
